deployment_binding.note: The /resources direct request redirects to /guides. Its first response does not expose the commit response header; the final artifact, client-navigation row, and before/after alias binding identify the same exact deployment.

summary.visual_failure_reason: The THE PROMISE panel overlays and obscures the OUR MISSION panel. At 390, underlying mission copy is visibly sliced behind it; at 360, mission content is effectively hidden. Width equality and empty browser error arrays do not detect this occlusion.
